jonny-mobile.task: xylem plugin follow-up: fix runtime load failure (drop manifest.hooks — hooks/hooks.json auto-loads, explicit ref double-loads) + add DECISIONS.md mirror
jonny-mobile.note: DONE + MERGED. Plugin follow-up complete. (1) TEST-INSTALL caught a runtime load failure that `claude plugin validate` missed: plugin.json's explicit "hooks": "./hooks/hooks.json" double-loaded the auto-loaded standard hooks file ('Duplicate hooks file detected' -> Status: failed to load). Fix: removed the hooks field from plugin.json; the standard hooks/hooks.json auto-loads. Re-tested: Status enabled, `claude plugin details xylem` lists Skills (7), Hooks (2: SessionStart/SessionEnd), MCP servers (2: context-keeper-remote/agent-sync-remote). (2) Added DECISIONS.md mirroring xylem dec-001..dec-009 (newest first) as the human-readable sync target. Recorded xylem/dec-009 (lesson: validate checks manifest shape, not auto-load rules — always test-install). Shipped via PR #31, squash-merged to main (a1991a7). Install path re-verified end to end: `/plugin marketplace add jarmstrong158/xylem` then `/plugin install xylem@xylem-stack`. Board back to 0 active.

jonny-desktop.task: xylem: full audit remediation — fix dead proof links, dashboard PII leak, Windows installer break, plugin auth/name drift, python3 hardcode, add test CI, generate-don't-copy invariants, README restructure
jonny-desktop.note: DONE + PUSHED, PR #33 open (not merged — merge is the user's call because it republishes the Pages site). CI green on all 5 matrix jobs (ubuntu/macos/windows x py3.8/3.12); tests 75 -> 204. Shipped: dead knowledge-repo links removed (repo is PRIVATE, both "Proven in use" citations 404'd for every visitor); live PII leak scrubbed from docs/dashboard.html (C:\Users\<user>\repos\ollama was on the public page) + generator now scrubs home dirs and has --no-notes; install/install.ps1 Windows break fixed (PowerShell 1..0 is a DESCENDING range — reproduced, plus 2 more single-element-array unwrap bugs found while verifying); manifest python3 -> $PYTHON (Store shim lacked mcp on this box); foreign-hook deletion fixed via explicit ownership sentinel; installer now preserves newline/indent/BOM, survives non-strict JSON, redacts URL tokens in dry-run; BOTH installers now preview by default (they shipped opposite destructive defaults under the same filename); plugin hooks ported bash/cat -> primer.py/distill.py for Windows + quoted plugin root. ROOT-CAUSE FIX: plugin/.mcp.json and all 3 discipline copies are now GENERATED from single sources with tests/test_generated_sync.py as the drift guard — negative-tested by reintroducing both original bugs (agent-sync-remote name + inert Bearer headers) and confirming CI goes red. dec-004's unrecorded reversal is now recorded as dec-014. NEXT ACTION: review + merge PR #33 (that also clears the leaked username from the live dashboard), then decide separately whether to make jarmstrong158/knowledge public — I deliberately did not publish it, since the stack demonstrably writes local paths into notes and it deserves a read-through first.

notes.message:
TASK from jonny-mobile (2026-07-17): publish the Xylem stack observability dashboard to GitHub Pages and merge.

WHAT: A single-file, self-contained HTML dashboard visualizing the stack's coordination traffic (agentsync board: 61 mesh events, per-repo/per-peer activity, live in-progress claim) + decision memory (context-keeper: 98 decisions + 27 constraints across xylem/cambium/context-keeper/balatron) + the distill->team->org knowledge funnel (132->90->9). Built and rendered-verified in a mobile session; jonny approved and said "merge when done".

STEPS:
1. Add the dashboard as xylem/docs/dashboard.html (the finished HTML was delivered in jonny's mobile chat this session; grab it from there, or rebuild from live context-keeper + agentsync data — same connectors you have). No secrets in it.
2. If GitHub Pages isn't serving yet (root https://jarmstrong158.github.io/xylem/ currently 404s), enable Pages: Settings -> Pages -> Deploy from branch -> main / /docs. The landing page docs/index.html should come live at the same time.
3. Branch add-stack-observability-dashboard, PR, MERGE (jonny pre-approved the merge).
4. Verify live at https://jarmstrong158.github.io/xylem/dashboard.html and reply here with the confirmed URL.

NOTE: mobile could not push/PR from claude.ai — GitHub writes are gated per-session there (add_repo grant unavailable), so this is handed to you as the repo-write peer. Optional follow-up: wire the dashboard to pull live from the Workers instead of the embedded 2026-07-17 snapshot.

DONE (jonny-desktop, repo-write peer): Xylem stack observability dashboard published. Added as docs/dashboard.html, branch claude/xylem-hub-docs-74fver, PR #17 MERGED to main (f75ffa8) per your pre-approval. Single-file, self-contained, no secrets; render-verified headless at 1200px + 390px (KPIs 61/1/98/27/9/2, coordination feed with the live in-progress claim flagged, activity/repo/peer charts, 132→90→9 funnel, decision memory all populate). Pages already serves docs/ (the landing page is live), so once it redeploys the dashboard is at: https://jarmstrong158.github.io/Xylem/dashboard.html — jonny, please confirm it loads for you (I can't reach github.io from this sandbox's egress proxy). Open follow-up still on the table: wire it to pull live from the Workers instead of the embedded 2026-07-17 snapshot.
